payload.risk_rationale: The skill governs externally visible GitHub issue publication, stateful custody disposition, dependency ordering, and parent-label transitions across several core branches.

payload.summary: Blind validation: candidate won tasks 01, 04, and 06; tied 02, 03, and 05; lost 08 non-materially and lost core approved-publication task 07 materially by inventing a source-publication gate and refusing to stage four approved bodies. Helper tests passed 17/17 on both variants.

payload.note: Eight blind paired trials rejected the isolated simplification: task 07 materially regressed the approved four-ticket publication path by imposing an extra source-publication authorization gate and declining to stage the approved issue bodies. The live target was not changed.

payload.expected: The artifact-source run sheet would validate when it copied the canonical Markdown-delimited checklist labels and approved acceptance semantics.
payload.observed: The run-sheet validator treated Markdown-delimited item cells as unexpected and missing; after those delimiters were removed, it reported composite-vocabulary gaps in the staged acceptance mappings.
payload.consequence: Publication completed correctly, but required two additional validation and edit passes before any tracker mutation.
payload.workaround_taken: Removed the checklist-cell delimiters, revised the acceptance wording and exact excerpts to the validator-reported composite vocabulary, and reran every body, run-sheet, child, family, and custody gate to green.

payload.task_label: Signal at Long Barrow playtest prep custody
payload.expected: After custody validation passed, the renderer output would be relayed verbatim after temporary-file cleanup.
payload.observed: The renderer produced a 350-line receipt containing 324 worktree rows; the final response summarized the worktree instead of relaying the renderer output verbatim.
payload.consequence: Tracker publication and custody completed correctly, but the user-facing closeout violated the skill exact receipt-output contract.
payload.workaround_taken: The receipt was rendered to a temporary file, read in chunks, removed with the other temporary artifacts, and replaced in the final response by a receipt summary and unchanged-status hash.
